indications.text:
Mentax® (butenafine HCl cream), 1%, is indicated for the topical treatment of the following
dermatologic infections: tinea (pityriasis) versicolor due to M. furfur (formerly P. orbiculare),
interdigital tinea pedis (athlete’s foot), tinea corporis (ringworm) and tinea cruris (jock itch) due to
E. fl...
